issues.title: Enemy dealt 40 dmg (65% of 62 HP) on floor 15
issues.description: On floor 15, encounter 2, turn 20 (seq 936), the enemy dealt 40 damage which is 65% of the player's 62 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 39 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-13)
issues.description: 39 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:100HP, F1E1:100HP, F1E2:100HP, F2E0:100HP, F2E1:100HP, F2E2:99HP, F3E0:100HP, F3E1:100HP, F3E2:97HP, F4E0:100HP, F4E1:100HP, F4E2:99HP, F5E0:100HP, F5E1:100HP, F5E2:100HP, F6E0:98HP, F6E1:98HP, F6E2:96HP, F7E0:98HP, F7E1:100HP, F7E2:100HP, F8E0:96HP, F8E1:94HP, F8E2:100HP, F9E0:92HP, F9E1:100HP, F9E2:100HP, F10E0:98HP, F10E1:100HP, F10E2:100HP, F11E0:96HP, F11E1:100HP, F11E2:100HP, F12E0:100HP, F12E1:98HP, F12E2:99HP, F13E0:93HP, F13E1:93HP, F13E2:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 12 turns vs prev floor avg 3.0
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 took 12 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.0 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: knowledge_golem (boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 17 in floor 18 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 18, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 17. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (1242 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
